mapper.sql: id, board_id as boardId, title, author, content, view_count as viewCount, base_ymd as baseYmd, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cms.posts (board_id, title, author, content, base_ymd) VALUES (#{boardId}, #{title}, #{author}, #{content}, #{baseYmd})
mapper.update: UPDATE cms.posts SET title = #{title}, author = #{author}, content = #{content}, base_ymd = #{baseYmd}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE cms.posts SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT , (SELECT count(*) FROM cms.file_match fm WHERE fm.table_name = 'posts' AND fm.target_id = p.id AND fm.file_type = 'attachment') as attachmentCount FROM cms.posts p
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{skip}
